title: mentha × verticillata var. ballotifolia
intro: Mentha × verticillata var. ballotifolia, commonly known as the peppermint-leafed or peppermint-leaved mint, is a variety of mint plant that belongs to the family Lamiaceae. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to ease digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural antiseptic due to its high concentration of menthol and menthone. The health benefits of Mentha × verticillata var. ballotifolia include relief from nausea, headaches, and fever, as well as its potential to improve respiratory function and boost energy levels. The leaves and flowers of this plant can be used to prepare various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be consumed or applied topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
